facts.claim: Cluster has only 4 catalog rules (RULE-EQUILIBRIO-001..004) covering 10 criterios of one Tasy-upstream boolean-flag trilha: fluid balance (1-4), renal/drug subst.+morphine avoidance+hypernatremia (5-8,10), alert-color aggregation, hyperkalemia rescue (9).
Themes: fluid-balance titration; nephrotoxic-drug substitution + opioid adjustment under renal impairment; Na/K emergency protocols (Na>160, K>6); alert-color aggregation deciding visible criteria.
All 4 rules derive from one legacy module (trilha_equilibrio.py, trilha7.py; repo ahlabs-trilhas, commit 8166c07e) - cohesive unit, not diffuse.
Live alert-color logic (RULE-EQUILIBRIO-003) surfaces only [1,3,6,8,9] via get_detalhe(); criteria 2,4,5,7,10 are payload text but never reach UI/affect color.
A second count-based alert-color algorithm (amarelo:2/vermelho:3 over all 10 flags) coexists but caller is commented out - dead code, not live discrepancy.
Unmerged variant TrilhaSeteSintetico (trilha_automatica7) uses amarelo:4/vermelho:5, surfaces ALL 10 criteria - never reconciled, no Phase-1 ID.

Histogram: type threshold=1(001), decision-tree=2(002,003), workflow=1(004); category alert-threshold=2(001,003), drug-dosing=2(002,004); status OK=4/DISCREPANCY=0/AMBIGUOUS=0; verdict NOT_APPLICABLE=2(001,003), VERIFIED=1(002), DISCREPANCY=1(004).
RULE-EQUILIBRIO-001: BH cutoff >3000ml/24h; soroterapia floor 5ml/h; hydration ceiling ~2400ml/dia; verify=false, no published anchor.
RULE-EQUILIBRIO-002 hypernatremia cutoff Na>160mEq/L; agua filtrada 400ml 6/6h, NaCl 0.22% 84ml/h, hydrochlorothiazide 25mg x2/day; VERIFIED vs Sterns/Adrogué-Madias NEJM 2000, AAFP 2015.

RULE-EQUILIBRIO-004: K>6 -> calcium gluconate, furosemide 20mg x3 bolus, polarizing solution, fenoterol/salbutamol x3 q15min; +4h if K>5.5 repeat + bicarbonate 8.4% 1ml/kg + Sorcal 15g q8h. DISCREPANCY vs KDIGO 2020/UpToDate.

constraints.text: MUST preserve verbatim: RULE-EQUILIBRIO-004 labels potassium 'mg/dl' ('5,5mg/dl') though physiologically mEq/L; flag this unit bug explicitly in ADOPT-CORRECTED, never propagate uncorrected.
MUST NOT treat dead count-based define_tipo_alerta() path as live discrepancy - caller commented out, OK status correct; RATIFY only if reviving.
MUST decide disposition for criteria 2,4,5,7,10 (never surfaced/never affect color) - ADAPT to restore or RATIFY as intentional; silent drop loses renal/morphine/nephrotoxic recs.

load_bearing_rules.what: Fluid-balance 1-4: >3000ml/24h BH, accum. positive BH, unneeded soroterapia, falling diurese
Nephrotoxic drug substitution, morphine avoidance, hypernatremia (Na>160) correction
Alert-color: vermelho if 1/9, amarelo if 3/6/8; only [1,3,6,8,9] surfaced

systemic_issues.issue: Unit mislabeling: potassium tagged mg/dl not mEq/L
Dead code: count-based alert-color path, uncalled
Unmerged variant TrilhaSeteSintetico, divergent thresholds/full surfacing
Criteria drift: half computed but never shown/never affect severity
No frontend copy of criteria text; backend-only, easy to lose in rewrite

vocab_notes: PT-BR verbatim: balanco hidrico, soroterapia de manutencao, bexigoma, prova de expansao volemica, hipercalemia grave, solucao polarizante, Sorcal; enum {VERMELHO, AMARELO, NEUTRO}.
open_questions: Restore criteria 2,4,5,7,10 to clinician-visible output, or formally retire?
Ratify TrilhaSeteSintetico's divergent severity model as alternate, or discard?
